title: Disaster Loans * Business Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Disaster Loans * Business Issues 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Agricultural Issues Business Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BUSINESS OREGON SMALL BUSINESS NAVIGATOR HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and resource referral for businesses in Oregon regarding wildfires and other emergencies. Includes information on financial assistance programs and reopening guidance. 775 Summer Street NE Suite 200 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Business owners and employers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (833) 604-0880 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES SMALL BUSINESS ADMINISTRATION ECONOMIC INJURY DISASTER LOAN PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Funding to cover small business operating expenses after a declared disaster. Eligibility: Must be located in a federally declared disaster area Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 659-2955 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES SMALL BUSINESS ADMINISTRATION BUSINESS PHYSICAL DISASTER LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides loans of up to $2,000,000 to qualified business or nonprofit organizations. Loan proceeds may be used for repair or replacement of physical property, machinery, inventory, or improvements to the business site. This program covers losses not fully covered by insurance. Eligibility: Must be located in a federally declared disaster area Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 659-2955 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BUSINESS OREGON SMALL BUSINESS NAVIGATOR HOTLINE
